description: CompositionWhite polo neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a ribbed collar, raglan sleeves with iconic stripes in blue from the collar to cuffs, buttoned chest placket and embroidered brand name on the upper left chestFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach, soak or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on designThe iconic blue stripes do all the talking on this white polo neck T-shirt from adidas. The embroidered brand name on the upper left chest adds interesting detail, while the polyester fabric keeps you feeling comfortable on extended training sessions. Team this with tracks or training shorts.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
